title: SciVisAgentSkills: Design and Evaluation of Agent Skills for Scientific Data Analysis and Visualization
summary: SciVisAgentSkills: Design and Evaluation of Agent Skills for Scientific Data Analysis and Visualization
whyItMatters: Recent advances in agentic visualization have enabled the translation of natural language into executable scientific visualization (SciVis) workflows. While general-purpose coding agents show strong capabilities, they often lack the tool-specific expertise required for SciVis tasks. In this work, we present SciVisAgentSkills, a collection of reusable agent…
